affiliate_marketing_content: Affiliate links and transparency on my website

I use affiliate links on my website to introduce you to suitable products and services. Transparency is particularly important to me. Below I explain how affiliate links work and what that means for you.
Affiliate links are special links that lead to products or services from partner companies. If you buy something via such a link I receive a commission. There are no additional costs for you.

Using affiliate links helps me run the website and provide the content for free. I carefully select my partners and the recommended products and ensure that they match the topics and interests of my visitors.

To track that a purchase was made via my link my partner companies use cookies. These store information for a limited time when you click on an affiliate link. You can find more information about this in my privacy policy.
Important to know: Clicking on affiliate links does not result in any disadvantages for you. The prices of the products or services remain unchanged and there are no hidden fees.
I only recommend products and services that I am convinced of. However I assume no liability for the quality or availability of the advertised offers since these are provided by my partners.

My goal is to communicate transparently and honestly with you. If you have any questions about the affiliate links or my partnerships please do not hesitate to contact me. I appreciate your trust in my recommendations!
* As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases.
